name: filetile
title: FileTile
description: File row with type icon (inferred from extension), size/status meta, progress or error state.

files.content:
File row with type icon (inferred from extension), size/status meta, progress or error state.

```jsx
<FileTile name="hero-final.mp4" size="48 MB" status="Converting…" progress={62} />
<FileTile name="notes.pdf" size="1.2 MB" onRemove={remove} />
```
